items.title: Solana hits 2023 lows amid panic selling: Is a 7% dip just the start of SOL’s pain?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's recent 7% dip to 2023 lows highlights increasing market volatility and may signal further declines, impacting investor confidence and liquidity.

items.title: BTC, ETH, SOL and XRP ETFs bleed $4.4 billion over 13 sessions, only HYPE in green
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $4.4 billion outflow from major ETFs, including those for SOL, indicates a significant loss of investor interest, which could affect Solana's market positioning.

items.title: Hyperliquid’s HYPE overtakes Solana in price as SOL falls to lowest levels since 2023
items.whyYouShouldCare: Hyperliquid's HYPE surpassing Solana in price reflects a shift in market preference, potentially undermining SOL's ecosystem usage and competitive standing.
